transcript:
Alice: Let's lock the sprint scope. We have two weeks.
Bob: I propose we focus on payment integration and skip the analytics rebuild.
Carol: Agreed, analytics can wait one more sprint.
Alice: Decision: payment integration is in, analytics rebuild is out.
Bob: I'll take the Stripe webhook work, due end of next week.
Carol: I'll handle the checkout UI, also end of next week.
Dave: I'll cover QA — full test plan by Wednesday.
